comments.body: @inknos you missed podman/tests/__init__.py . The API version is hard coded in the tests to ensure review of the API when changing the version number.

> you missed podman/tests/init.py . The API version is hard coded in the tests to ensure review of the API when changing the version number.

Thanks Jhon I was actually counting on you because I didn't know what was the issue right away, and I started working on something else.
